transcript.text:
[Kimbap Heaven] (Franchise)
[With 1,000+ reviews]
This is not Kimbap Heaven
[This is not your normal Kimbap Heaven]
She's been here for 10 years
[With genuine reactions]
[Another level]
Can I take some of this home?
Incredible
This is homemade?
[Everything is made from scratch]
I've been to lots of Kimbap Heaven And this is the best one
Hello everyone
Do you see that over there?
I came to Kimbap Heaven
I've been craving bunsik

This is the Konkuk University 2nd Location
They have special menu items here
Their delivery reviews exceed over 1,200
I will conquer this location
[Kimbap Cheonguk (Heaven)] [Konkuk University 2nd Location]
Hello
[Order from the kiosk]
The popular items are here
One of the Aged Kimchi Tuna Kimbap since it's the best
Kondae Yubu Roll They only have this at this location
Spicy Sujebi Soup
[Radish Kimchi Bibim Guksu]
[Kondae Soup Tteokboki]
[Bulgogi Bibimbap]
[And everything else that was on the popular list]
Donkatsu You can't forget about that

[Sweet Potato Donkatsu (Pork Cutlet)]
And ramyun noodles, of course
[Cheese Ramyun]
[These are only served at this location!]
[Rice on top of Yubu (fried tofu)]
[Their special seasoning paste will be revealed soon]
[Aged Kimchi Tuna Kimbap] [Kondae Yubu Roll]
[Hold off on the fried egg and the veggies]
[Because there's beef bulgogi]
[Bulgogi Bibimbap (mixed rice)]
[You must have this if you're in Kimbap Heaven]
[Sweet Potato Donkatsu]
[Cheese Ramyun]
[Kondae Soup Tteokboki]
[Radish Kimchi Bibim Guksu Noodles]
[The chef's dough ripping skills]

[Spicy Hand Sujebi Soup]
Order up~
-Thank you -Enjoy
Everything, in general, has good portions
Look how packed this is
[How will you eat all of that?]
Let's start with the ramyun noodles first
It's been so long
Cheese ramyun is my favorite
These are the best here
Should I just go ahead and finish this bowl?
This is delicious
How come these taste so much better than the ones you make at home?
They're about 2 times better
It's gone
The portions are big

Even the kimbap roll It's as big as my arm
Long and thick
Filled with aged kimchi and tuna
So chunky It's almost as big as my fist
Really Size of my fist
Aged kimchi makes it so good
It's my first time seeing an aged kimchi kimbap Pretty sure other locations have it too
But these 2 items are invented in this location
This kimbap only exists here, right?
As far as I know, yes Out of all of the Kimbap Heaven franchises
Our owner here supports inventing new menu items for our customers
Yes, I have never seen Yubu Kimbap like this in other locations
Really packed with ingredients
Dip it in the sauce
We are rated top 5 out of all the restaurants here in Konkuk University region
The food is good and we don't give small portions

Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
The soup tteokboki is very popular here
It's something that students would like
Perfect amount of sweetness and spiciness
[Cold Noodle (Naengmyeon) broth]
-This is all handmade from here? -Yes
[She's glowing...]
Wow, the broth is amazing I should've ordered a Naengmyeon
It's really hard to make this broth from home
Incredible
This location delivers all the way to my home
[Those big orders are all me]
This is also very popular here
Everyone was ordering this from the reviews
This isn't Kimbap Heaven
Tasty

The chef really knows how to cook
This is exactly what would be served at a Sujebi restaurant
Very good
[Proud]
It looks like they give almost double the size in portions than other locations
This is a lot
Let's pour some broth in here
That's so good
This is perfectly seasoned
[You eat and I film]
So tasty
This is really savory
Not salty at all
This is really delicious
[Filming better than our PD]
[Yubu Kimbap Roll]

They can rip out, so carefully with a spoon
What's this inside?
This isn't kimbap ingredients
[Who are you...?]
So good
What's inside?
This is our own recipe
Stir-fried meat with a variety of veggies
To enhance the texture and the flavor of the kimbap
You need soft and moist rice for Yubu rolls
And these are just like that And really nicely seasoned
The fillings make it even better
So good
This one next
Bulgogi Bibimbap
Look at the quality

This really isn't Kimbap Heaven
[Chives, radish, beef, bracken, perilla leaf, lettuce, bean sprouts, dried seaweed flakes]
So many ingredients
They really don't skimp out on their food ingredients
I'll need to put a lot of the chili paste sauce to fit the amount
The visuals...
I'll go ahead and take a bite
So delicious
Can I take some of this home?
I want to use this at home
I can eat 10 bowls of rice just with this
Some gochujang (chili paste)
Some sujebi soup
Wait, not gochujang Bibimbap
I still haven't tried the donkatsu (pork cutlet)
Sweet potato donkatsu

Tasty
Excuse me, Is this gochujang sold in the market?
No, our chef makes it
This too?! She makes everything
All of the sauces here are made by her
This has got to be the best Kimbap Heaven location
Potatoes too?
Potatoes!
[WIth some tteokboki sauce]
A bite of this makes you crave some ramyun noodle toppings
Really
Feels like 2.5 servings of the 3,000 Won kimbap rolls
All of these dishes really make me feel like I'm eating home-cooked meals
1 bite left
So good Not even soggy
This has to be eaten with tteokboki sauce

Some Naengmyeon broth as a palate cleanser
That's amazing
Your cooking skills are amazing
Everything here is so delicious
Really The best
You really ate everything
I'm not finished yet
But I will be
Are you okay?
Naengmyeon broth
Absolutely incredible
Isn't that an ahjussi expression?
Right,
I've never said that before
Tteokboki soup
Excuse me, Sorry to interrupt,

Delivery driver: I told my driver group chat that Tzuyang is here having a meal
-And they're saying that I'm making an April Fool's joke -Oh, today is April 1st!
So I'm going to need 1 photo with you
An April Fool's joke? haha
[Proof]
I need to show that we're at Kimbap Heaven
[And that's how everyone started to look for the 'Kimbap Heaven' logo]
[That's just adorable]
[Found the logo]
[2nd photo proof]
[He's so happy]
[And they find this cute]
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
Drive safe!
Today is April 1st!
[I told you it wasn't a joke!]

[Take some photos like this]
1 of these feel like 2 regular pieces
Last piece of egg
1 last bite
[Conquered]
I approve
[Kimbap Heaven master]
-Thank you for enjoying our food -It was really delicious
[The chef already knew who Tzuyang was]
My son is going crazy over the phone right now
Our chef has been here for 10 years
I had a great meal
I'm thankful that you enjoyed it
[Thank you]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
